## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Bubble and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and progress on AI-driven content generation engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented draft content strategy with 5 topic clusters, aligning with Bubble's product repositioning and audience segments](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Bubble has high domain authority (DA), giving advantage in owning new AI app builder category keywords](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=475.0)
  - [Content refresh prioritized due to Bubble's recent product shift to AI-driven visual development](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)
  - [Scrunch dashboard shows strong Bubble presence in LLM responses (4% citation rate)](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Overview

  - [5 topic clusters: AI app builder/visual programming, startup/small business, business professionals, enterprises, comparisons/best-of](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Strategy aims to support product repositioning from no-code to AI-driven visual development](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Clusters align with audience personas and potential for cross-channel content reuse](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=563.0)

### Existing Content Audit & Refresh

  - [Plan to overhaul \~60 existing tutorials, updating for AI features and new UI design](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Preference for video tutorials with SEO-optimized supporting copy](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [GrowthX to assist in assessing content for refresh vs. new creation](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1212.0)
  - [High priority on updating high-ranking content cited by LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1228.0)

### Scrunch Dashboard Results

  - [230 prompts generated, \~2,000 responses collected](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Bubble showing strong presence across multiple LLMs (ChatGPT, Meta, Perplexity)](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)
  - [4% citation rate, higher than typical 2-3% seen for other brands](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Prompts to be reviewed for neutrality and relevance to new positioning](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)

### Product Updates & Branding

  - [Bubble launching major AI features and global access on October 17th](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=79.0)
  - [Complete redesign of property editors planned by end of year](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Updated Brand Voice and Positioning Guide now available, reflecting latest features and positioning](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Deedi to review content strategy document and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1735.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct existing content audit using Google Search Console and SEMrush data](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Review and potentially update Scrunch prompts to align with new positioning](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1625.0)
  - [Next week: review keywords, content calendar, and demo Atlas platform](https://fathom.video/share/cFK1fudxoCLnTWnsDZs9xoXBPkQUHaB-?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
